name: baseball_detector_flutter
description: A new Flutter project.
publish_to: 'none'
version: 1.17.0+174

environment:
  sdk: '>=3.3.4 <4.0.0'
  flutter: 3.32.4

dependencies:
  flutter:
    sdk: flutter
  flutter_localizations:
    sdk: flutter

  # Authentication & AWS
  amplify_auth_cognito: 2.6.5
  amplify_auth_cognito_dart: 0.11.13
  amplify_flutter: 2.6.5

  # Deep linking & App info
  app_links: 6.4.1
  apple_product_name: 3.6.0
  package_info_plus: 8.3.1

  # Async & Utilities
  async: 2.13.0
  collection: 1.19.1
  meta: 1.16.0
  mutex: 3.1.0
  synchronized: 3.4.0
  uuid: 4.5.1

  # Network & HTTP
  dio: 5.9.0
  background_downloader: 9.2.5
  connectivity_plus: 6.1.5
  http_parser: 4.1.2
  mime: 2.0.0

  # UI Components & Charts
  cached_network_image: 3.4.1
  dots_indicator: 4.0.1
  fl_chart: 1.0.0
  flutter_hooks: 0.21.3
  flutter_slidable: 4.0.1
  flutter_svg: 2.2.1
  gap: 3.0.1
  visibility_detector: 0.4.0+2
  tutorial_coach_mark: 1.3.1

  # State Management
  hooks_riverpod: 2.6.1
  riverpod_annotation: 2.6.1

  # Device & Hardware
  device_info_plus: 11.5.0
  native_device_orientation: 2.0.3
  permission_handler: 12.0.1
  sensors_plus: 6.1.2
  wakelock_plus: 1.3.2

  # File & Storage
  file_saver: 0.3.1
  flutter_secure_storage: 9.2.4
  path: 1.9.1
  path_provider: 2.1.5
  shared_preferences: 2.5.3
  sqflite: 2.4.2

  # Media & Sharing
  image_picker: 1.2.0
  share_plus: 11.1.0
  video_player: 2.10.0

  # Web & In-app browser
  flutter_inappwebview: 6.1.5

  # Internationalization & Formatting
  intl: 0.20.2
  sprintf: 7.0.0

  # Logging & Debugging
  fimber: 0.7.0

  # Data Processing & Queues
  dynamic_parallel_queue: 1.0.3+2

  # JSON & Serialization (runtime annotations)
  freezed_annotation: 3.1.0
  json_annotation: 4.9.0

  # Version management
  pub_semver: 2.2.0

  # In-app purchases
  in_app_purchase: 3.2.3
  in_app_purchase_storekit: 0.4.4

  # UI development & VRT (required because files are in lib/ directory)
  playbook: 1.1.0

  # Local packages
  knowhere_configurable_camera:
    path: ./knowhere_configurable_camera
  
  knowhere_video_editor:
    path: ./knowhere_video_editor

  volume_key_listener:
    path: ./volume_key_listener

dev_dependencies:
  flutter_test:
    sdk: flutter

  flutter_lints: 6.0.0

  # Code generation tools
  build_runner: 2.5.4
  flutter_gen_runner: 5.11.0
  freezed: 3.0.6
  json_serializable: 6.9.5
  riverpod_generator: 2.6.5

  # Development tools
  import_sorter: 4.6.0
  flutter_launcher_icons: 0.14.4

  # Testing tools
  mockito: 5.4.6 
  shared_preferences_platform_interface: 2.4.1

  # UI development & debugging tools (generators only)
  playbook_generator: 1.1.0
  playbook_snapshot: 1.0.2

  # License analysis tools
  licenses_dart: 1.1.2

flutter_gen:
   integrations:
    flutter_svg: true

flutter:
  uses-material-design: true

  # 自動ファイル生成
  generate: true

  # To add assets to your application, add an assets section, like this:
  assets:
    - assets/images/

  fonts:
    - family: NotoSans
      fonts:
        - asset: assets/fonts/NotoSansJP-Light.ttf
          weight: 300
        - asset: assets/fonts/NotoSansJP-Regular.ttf
          weight: 400
        - asset: assets/fonts/NotoSansJP-Medium.ttf
          weight: 500
        - asset: assets/fonts/NotoSansJP-SemiBold.ttf
          weight: 600
        - asset: assets/fonts/NotoSansJP-Bold.ttf
          weight: 700

playbook_snapshot:
  snapshot_dir: ../../screenshots

import_sorter:
  ignored_files:
    - test/data/query_runner_test.dart
    - lib/generated_playbook.dart
    - lib/gen/assets.gen.dart
    - '\/*.g.dart'
    - '\/*.freezed.dart'
    - '\/*.mocks.dart'
    - '\/lib/l10n/*'

<tool_use_error>String to replace not found in file.
String: /// 仕様項目を範囲文字列にフォーマット
String? _formatSpecRange(_SpecItem item) {
  if (item.values.isEmpty) return null;

  final sortedValues = item.values.map((e) => e.toDouble()).toList()..sort();
  final formattedValues = sortedValues.map(item.formatter).toList();

  if (formattedValues.isEmpty) return null;

  final unit = formattedValues.first.unit;
  final hasUnit = unit.isNotEmpty;

  if (formattedValues.length == 1) {
    final value = formattedValues.first.value;
    return hasUnit ? '$value $unit' : value;
  }

  final first = formattedValues.first.value;
  final last = formattedValues.last.value;
  final range = '$first - $last';

  return '${item.label}: ${hasUnit ? '$range $unit' : range}';
}</tool_use_error>
